positive: A celestial forest of bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central focus on a majestic, stylized stag with antlers adorned with glowing vines and oversized crystalline mushrooms. The setting features towering, gnarled trees with glowing edges and a ground cover of intricate, patterned moss. The atmosphere is mystical and serene. Style: High contrast, maximalist, detailed line work mixed with soft glow effects. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, full-body portrait of the stag, allowing negative space around the edges. Lighting: Dramatic volumetric light shafts cutting through the canopy, emphasizing the bioluminescence. Color Palette: Deep midnight blues, emerald greens, sapphire blues, and pops of luminous gold and cyan. Print Details: Designed as a repeating or single-use, high-resolution illustration suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, emphasizing clean silhouettes and graphic strength.
negative: low contrast, blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logos, cropped, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, ugly, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts
